title: fagara leonis
intro: Fagara leonis, also known as the Asian prickly ash, is a plant species in the genus Zanthoxylum. It is a type of shrub or small tree native to Southeast Asia, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant contains compounds such as sesquiterpenes and flavonoids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. Fagara leonis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
